title: Assistant Store Manager - Poojara Telecom - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Poojara Telecom - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Assistant Store Manager with drive and ambition, Poojara Telecom in Jodhpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Poojara Telecom:
Poojara Telecom is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Poojara Telecom!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
